description: Let workspace admins invite members, manage roles, revoke access, and review audit history.

userStories.title: Record membership changes in audit storage
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want membership changes recorded durably so access changes can be reviewed later.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit storage captures invite, role change, and revoke events with actor, target member, change type, and timestamp.
Membership mutations write an audit record when they succeed.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Create member invitation workflow
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to invite a member by email so I can grant workspace access without database edits.
acceptanceCriteria: Application accepts an email address and creates a pending workspace invitation for a valid member invite.
Duplicate active membership or invitation attempts are rejected with a clear error.
Successful invitations append an audit event.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add member invite form to workspace settings
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want an invite form in workspace settings so I can send member invitations from the product UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace settings page includes an email input and invite action for admins.
Submitting a valid email shows the new pending invitation state in the settings experience.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Persist member role changes
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to change a member role between viewer, editor, and admin so access matches responsibilities.
acceptanceCriteria: Application updates a member role only to viewer, editor, or admin.
Role changes append an audit event with previous and new role values.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add role management controls to member settings
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want role controls in workspace settings so I can update member permissions from the member list.
acceptanceCriteria: Each member entry exposes viewer, editor, and admin role options for admins.
Changing a role updates the visible member role after the save completes.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Revoke workspace membership access
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to revoke workspace access so former collaborators can no longer use the workspace.
acceptanceCriteria: Application removes or deactivates the targeted membership when revoke succeeds.
Revoked members no longer appear as active workspace members in returned data.
Successful revocations append an audit event.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add revoke access action to member settings
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want a revoke action in workspace settings so I can remove member access from the UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace settings shows a revoke action for each removable member.
Confirming revoke removes the member from the active settings list view.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Show recent membership audit history in workspace settings
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes in workspace settings so I can audit who changed access and when.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace settings displays recent membership audit entries with actor, change type, target member, and timestamp.
Audit view includes invite, role change, and revoke events from recorded history.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
